title: The Long Night: Before Westeros Had Kings #got #shorts
description: Long before kings and castles, the world was older, darker, and far more dangerous. This is the beginning of the Long Night. #ASOIAF #LongNight #Shorts

scenes.narration: Before kings, before castles, and before history… there was a world lost to time.
scenes.image_prompt: ancient untouched wilderness under dark sky with no civilization, mystical and eerie, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Westeros was not ruled by men, but by ancient forces older than memory.
scenes.image_prompt: vast forests with glowing eyes hidden within, ancient presence, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The Children of the Forest lived in harmony with the land, bound to nature and magic.
scenes.image_prompt: small mystical beings among trees with glowing symbols, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Their magic was old, quiet, and deeply connected to the world itself.
scenes.image_prompt: weirwood trees glowing softly with ancient energy, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Then came the First Men—bringing steel, fire, and war to a land that had never known it.
scenes.image_prompt: early humans entering forests with weapons and fire, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: They cut down sacred trees and broke the balance that had existed for centuries.
scenes.image_prompt: weirwood trees being destroyed, magic fading, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: War followed—long, brutal, and unlike anything the world had seen before.
scenes.image_prompt: battle between First Men and Children of the Forest in ancient setting, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: In desperation, the Children turned to a power they barely understood.
scenes.image_prompt: Children performing ancient ritual in darkness, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: They sought a weapon… something that could stop the war forever.
scenes.image_prompt: ritual intensifying with dark energy forming, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: But what they created would become something far worse than war.
scenes.image_prompt: first hint of icy figure forming in shadows, ominous ending, vertical 1080x1920
